Name: AdaptiveArsenal
Author: Deadman
Description: Adaptive Arsenal is a modification that improves upon existing weapon mechanics within The Long Dark.

Name: AdjustableWalkSpeed
Author: Fuar
Description: Adjustable Walk Speed allows players to adjust the walk speed with scroll wheel inputs to be slower for more cinematic moments.

Name: AfflictionComponent
Author: Fuar
Description: A framework mod that allows modders to add their own custom afflictions to the game.

Name: AfraidoftheDark
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Makes the player anxious at night.

Name: AlcoholMod
Author: BA
Description: An optional addon for ModComponent enabling the alcohol mechanics. Without this, all alcoholic food functions as if it were non-alcoholic.

Name: AllRandomLayoutsAtOnce
Author: Romain
Description: This mod allows you to combine all random layouts in the same run.

Name: AlternativeParasitesAtMaxLvl
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Reintroduces Intestinal Parasites at Cooking level 5, with alternative, less harsh impact. Only impacts characters with cooking level 5.

Name: AlternativeActionUtilities
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: A utility mod for custom actions when clicking on things.

Name: AmbientLights
Author: Thekillergreece
Description: This mod aims to modify the default lightning for interiors with windows, making them brighter so you don't need a light source during midday to move around, and also more reflective of what's happening outside (time of day, weather, and sun position).

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkAmbushWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that hides around the map, waiting for you to walk by...

Name: AmmunitionCraftingTools
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: This mod revamps and changes the process of making ammunition, making it harder but more enjoyable and rewarding.

Name: AnimalRespawnTimeMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: This mod makes animals' respawn times adjustable in days through ModSettings.

Name: Architect
Author: Waltz
Description: Modular base building mod

Name: ArrowMod
Author: ttr
Description:
Allows to change duration of crafting arrow and arrowhead. Adds additionall crafting options for arrows.

 Game Restart might be required after settingts change.

Name: AudioCore
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: THIS IS A PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!! PLUGIN!!!

Name: AudioManager
Author: Digitalzombie
Description:
Helper mod for using custom audioclips and controlling vanilla audio. 

Disable flare audio, disable waterfall audio adjust wind effect volume (eg. like clattering) when indoors, adjust aurora music volume

Name: AuroraMonitor
Author: The Illusion
Description: A WIP mod that will eventually allow full control of weather. Currently allows control of Aurorae and will show weather stats in the First Aid screen

Name: AutoUpdatingPlugin
Author: STBlade
Description: Plugin. Updates most Mods & Plugins automatically.

Name: BeachcombingAdjustments
Author: ds5678
Description:
Lets you change the loot table for beachcombing.

Patreon

Name: BedrollTweaker
Author: Romain
Description:
* Adjust the warmth, the weight, the decay rates for each bedroll type.
* Enable bedrolls to "stack" warmth bonuses

Name: BetterBases
Author: Xpazeman
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that allows players to improve their bases in multiple ways: Most furniture can be moved (if you have cleared it of clutter first), most broken cabinets and drawers can be fixed, most of the clutter on interiors can be removed and some of it can also be moved.

Name: BetterCamera
Author: Marcy
Description: Improves the functionality of the camera by allowing to zoom, save photos to disk, and more

Name: BetterNightSky
Author: Marcy
Description: Overhauls the night sky with new features by adding meteor showers as well as giving the moon and stars a completely new look.

Name: BetterSkillXP
Author: Romain
Description: With this mod skills points are earned based on (tweakable) time spent doing stuff

Name: BetterWaterManagement
Author: STBlade
Description:
Mod improving the way water is managed for The Long Dark.

Installation Instructions

Name: BiggerTrappers
Author: BaltaZar
Description:
This mod expands Trapper's Cabin found in Mystery Lake to make it a little bigger in size.
Interior and exterior is modified along 1 axis (making it wider).

Name: Binoculars
Author: ds5678
Description:
Lets you see farther.

Installation Instructions

Patreon

Name: BleedingRevamped
Author: Romain
Description: Revamped bleeding mechanic for animals.

Name: BlueprintCleaner
Author: Romain
Description:
- This mod adds a little QoL to your Crafting/Cooking Panels.
- It lets you hide/display the Blueprint/recipe you want whenever you want to keep your panels as clean as possible.

Name: BountifulForaging
Author: Jods-Its
Description: Find food and useful materials in the wild.

Name: BowRepair
Author: Marcy
Description: Makes all bows repairable, with customizable cost and location.

Name: BricklayersDoorFix
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Fix the door at Bricklayer's Retreat.

Name: CaffeinatedSodas
Author: Marcy
Description: Sodas now reduce a slight amount of fatigue. Sodas often contain caffeine, so they're bound to give you at least a little kick, right?

Name: CampingTools
Author: Jods-Its
Description: Tools for outdoors adventures.

Name: Candlelight
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Adds candles and new materials to craft candles

Name: CanisterRefill
Author: TonisGaming
Description: Adds the ability to refill empty canisters used by the respirator

Name: CanneryManufacturing
Author: Varrxion
Description: Designed to improve the usability of the Last Resort Cannery Workshop in Bleak Inlet, especially on Interloper difficulty.

Name: CarcassYieldTweaker
Author: Romain
Description: Allows adjustment of carcass yield and harvesting time.

Name: CatchColdMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: This mod adds a mechanic of catching a Cold affliction, developing a resistance or the cold worsens to Pneumonia.

Name: ChangeCustomSettings
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Lets you change the difficulty settings of a running game

Name: ChooseStartingGearRedux
Author: MooseMeat
Description: REPLACES CHOOSE STARTING GEAR AND DLC-CHOOSE STARTING GEAR-DLC.  Select the items you would like to start the game with.

Name: ChooseStartingLocationTFTFT
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows you to choose your starting location when starting a new Sandbox game. 300+ locations, all regions, all difficulty modes. Full instructions in the README.

Name: ChooseStartingCondition
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: A mod for The Long Dark. This mod allows you to choose your starting condition, fatigue, hunger, thirst, warmth, injuries and illnesses when starting a new game.

Name: ClothingExpanded
Author: TonisGaming
Description: Adds a way to combine accessories with clothing to have even more accessories equipped at the same time

Name: ClothingTweaker2
Author: Waltz
Description: Clothing Tweaker reimagined. Allows you to edit clothing stats on the go

Name: CoastalConnection
Author: ds5678
Description:
Connects Coastal Highway and Bleak Inlet by their shared road.

Patreon

Name: CollectorCards
Author: Kaiusername
Description: Find a collection of hand-painted cards hidden across Great Bear!

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkCompanionWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that can be tempted with meat and eventually tamed. This mod is still very early in development, it works well enough to get the pup following you and growing but there are no functional changes beyond burning a hole in your meat stash.

Name: ComplexLogger
Author: The Illusion
Description: A mod that adds more complex logging to the game

Name: CoordinatesGrabber
Author: ds5678
Description:
Utility mod. Allows you to see/copy the name, position, rotation, and scene of interactive items.

Patreon

Name: CougarSoundBegone
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Kills the stupid cougar in the main menu on startup

Name: CozyBlankets
Author: Jods-Its
Description: Keep you warmer in those cold, winter nights. Original by ds5678.

Name: CozyCushions
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: 14 craftable pillows; sit on other objects like chairs, benches, toilets; optional buffs

Name: CraftAnywhereRedux
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Allows you to adjust the crafting location for vanilla craftable items.

Name: CraftingRevisions
Author: STBlade
Description:
** Now Part of ModComponent 7.0.0
Improves the Crafting UI and enables custom Blueprint/Recipe creation.

Name: CraftingHotkey
Author: BA
Description: Adds a hotkey for the crafting menu.

Name: CustomSaveDataUtilities
Author: ds5678
Description:
Utility mod for custom save data on gear items.

Patreon

Name: CustomWhiteout
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A mod for the Long Dark letting you experience a custom whiteout challenge.

Name: DIYbySantana
Author: Atlas Lumi
Description: Adds craftable furniture.

Name: DarkerNights
Author: Xpazeman
Description: Mod for The Long Dark to make nights darker, giving a new challenge.

Name: DeadAir
Author: TonisGaming
Description: IT IS HIGHLY SUGGESTED TO USE THIS ON ONLY NEW SAVES. Turns the entirety of Great Bear into a toxic wasteland, similar to ZoC's chemical pools. Expect issues

Name: DeveloperConsole
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: A mod that makes Hinterland's developer console accessible in-game. F1 to open / close the console, type 'help' to get a list of commands.

Name: DeveloperConsoleWintermute
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Console for storymode. Check the release notes for detailed instructions

Name: DisableCabinFever
Author: ds5678
Description:
Disables Cabin Fever in all game modes.

Patreon

Name: DroppableUndroppables
Author: Marcy
Description: Drop any item anywhere without restriction. No more undroppable collectibles, cameras, or shortwaves.

Name: DualSenseX
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Check instructions on github

Name: DynamicTemperature
Author: Fuar
Description: A gameplay mod that adds dynamic temperature and streamlined simulated thermodynamics to interior shelters. Keep your safehouses warm!

Name: DynamicTrees
Author: Fuar
Description: Dynamic Trees replaces the foliage texture of trees dynamically to represent accumulating snowfall to add another level of immersion to the game.

Name: DynamicWorld
Author: Fuar
Description: Adds dynamic events including earthquakes to make the world of Great Bear feel more dynamic and change over time.

Name: EdiblePlants
Author: Marcy
Description: Makes harvested plants edible with customizable calories and Vitamin C.

Name: EternalWeather
Author: Deadman
Description: Eternal Weather is a modification that allows the player to change the weather from a wide arrange of states that is set for an infinite amount of time.

Name: ExamineActionsAPI
Author: BA
Description: Modding framework for custom Examine actions.

Name: ExpandedAiFramework
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Provides framework needed for new spawn mechanics and AI behaviors.

Name: ExportJournal
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A mod for The Long Dark (2.51+) which allows the player to export the journal data of the active save game.

Name: ExtraGraphicsSettings
Author: The Illusion
Description: A mod that adds more options for graphical things.

Name: ExtremeTemperatureDrop
Author: The Illusion
Description: Alters temperature degradation

Name: FasterHarvesting
Author: The Illusion
Description: Adds customization options to change the time it takes to harvest things

Name: FasterSearching
Author: MikeyPdog
Description: Speeds up the search action on containers and makes searching instant for empty containers.

Name: FatDestroyer
Author: Data-0
Description: Despawn any low condition fat around the world, so it doesn't just stay ruined outside your door forever.

Name: FeatSettings
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Exposes effect and unlock settings for feats. Allows unlocking of legacy feat, "Big Cat Killer". Eliminates startup noises for feats unlocked "the wrong way" via bugs or console command use. Allows customizable number of feats at any difficulty level.

Name: FiligranisSkills
Author: BA
Description: Custom skill API

Name: FirePackDLC
Author: Jods-Its
Description: New renewable tools for starting fires. Original by ds5678 and WulfMarius.

Name: FireAddons
Author: ttr
Description: Smoldering Ash, cooking time based on temperature, different tinder have different fire starting buffs. Details in readme on github.

Name: FixSteamWorkshopItems
Author: STBlade
Description: Very quick mod to re-enable workshop localization files

Name: FoodPackByTKG
Author: Thekillergreece
Description:
Introduces 38 new food items to the game.

This mod was expanded with Waltz's mod in mind so be sure to download that one too!

Name: FoodTweaker
Author: Romain
Description: Food Tweaker. What does it do? It tweaks food.

Name: FoodsByCalorieWaltz
Author: Waltz
Description:
Adds 20+ unique, delicious food and beverage items. Insludes cute collectibles and handy settings!

Installed by unpacking it into .../Mods/

Name: ForagersDelight
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: Forager's Delight mod adds small (customizable) carry weight buff to some clothing items.

Name: ForgeBlueprintsDLC
Author: Jods-Its
Description: More blueprints in the forge. Original by ds5678.

Name: FortifiedLookouts
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Increase the size, add a second regular sized embedded lookout, and raise the windows for a clear view for the lookouts in Mystery Lake, Coastal Highway and Bleak Inlet.

Name: FoxCompanion
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: A little fox companion for the lonely TLD player.

Name: FriendlyInlet
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Make Bleak Inlet more friendly by redistributing wood spawns to the coast and reduce and relocate some wolf spawns.

Name: FrozenFood
Author: Fuar
Description: Frozen Food aims to add a bit more realism to the game by allowing food items to become frozen over time.

Name: FuelManager
Author: The Illusion
Description: Fuel Manager adds QOL features to assist with managing various fuel items. This includes all features of Better-Fuel-Management.

Name: FullSwing
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Adds options to modify swing speed and radius of fridge doors

Name: GearDecayModifier
Author: Romain
Description: Mod for The Long Dark to modify decay rates of gear. Settings go from completely stopping decay to making it much faster. Various categories to change.

Name: GearInfo
Author: Waltz
Description: Shows additional gear info in your inventory (there's a small (i) button next to gear name)

Name: GearPerfectConditionMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Sets condition to 100 for specified looted Gear items. Customizable Json. Default items: Matches, Lamp fuel, Mag lens, Antiseptic, Insulated flasks

Name: GearSpawner
Author: STBlade
Description:
** Now Part of ModComponent 7.0.0
Utility mod for spawning modded items.

Name: GreatBareIsland
Author: MooseMeat
Description: An alternate version of Great Bear Island that removes most cabins, trailers and generic houses or replaces them with ruins for a new challenge.

Name: HUDPositioner
Author: Marcy
Description: Allows extended customization of the in-game UI elements by changing where they are anchored on the screen and freely adjusting their position via Mod Settings.

Name: HUDTweaks
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: Enable/Disable certains parts of the UI for more immersive experience.

Name: Halloween
Author: TLD Modding Community
Description: Howl-oween - Brought to you by the Discord Modding Community

Name: HarvestYieldTweaker
Author: Fuar
Description: A gameplay mod that allows users to change how much yield breaking down certain items gives.

Name: HotkeyMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Simple hotkey mod. When equiping firearms, guns with the most bullets in the magazine will be equiped (If in the json list). When equiping torches, the one item with the LEAST codition comes up. The basic rule after the above rules: first item in the list is going to be equiped. Clothes and accessories are supported too, and there is a toggle function implemented, so first tap equips specified clothing item, second tap switches back the original item if there was any. Check the Repo for more details!

Name: HouseBasements
Author: ds5678
Description:
Adds some more basements to the game.

Patreon

Name: HouseLights
Author: Marcy
Description: Magically brings back electricity on Great Bear! No more stumbling around houses in the darkness!

Name: HowToRead
Author: The Illusion
Description: This mod is intended to catch users that do not read. This mod shouldnt be installed. If you are reading this, then you passed the test.

Name: HungerRevamped
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Improves the hunger system by separating hunger and stored calories. Adds customization options for various cooking such as enabling cooking ruined food.

Name: ImprovedAfflictions
Author: Fuar
Description: Improved Afflictions overhauls and changes many of the afflictions to last longer, provide more deadly affects and make the game more challenging.

Name: ImprovedClothing
Author: Fuar
Description: Adds clothing wetness from walking in snow and ice, animal attacks and a new quick way to place clothing items right off your body.

Name: ImprovedCougar
Author: Fuar
Description: A gameplay mod that adds and changes mechanics surrounding the Cougar

Name: ImprovedFlasks
Author: Fuar
Description: A gameplay mod that adds new QOL functionality to insulated flasks.

Name: ImprovedLoadingScreens
Author: Fuar
Description: A mod that improves the loading screens of the game with custom tips, background images and the ability to enable or disable various aspects of the loading screens.

Name: ImprovedMagnifyingLens
Author: Romain
Description: Add a little realism to lighting a fire with a magnifying glass

Name: ImprovedRestForAll
Author: Romain
Description: This mod allows condition recovery from Improved Rest Buff when Condition Recovery During Rest is set to none (Custom Mode).

Name: ImprovedSoundtrack
Author: Fuar
Description: Improves the in game soundtrack by adding new conditions to play rare or removed music tracks from the OST. Including new location discovered stingers.

Name: ImprovedTales
Author: Fuar
Description: Improves the Signal Void Tale with QOL customization options.

Name: InDoorTemp
Author: ttr
Description: Indoor temps are aligned with outdoor ones. Shelters (snow, cars, caves) do not add flat bonus anymore.

Name: IndoorCampfires
Author: Xpazeman
Description: This mod allows you to create campfires indoors.

Name: IndoorsGreenery
Author: Jods-Its
Description: Make your own indoor farm and regrow plants.

Name: InfiniteCheatDeath
Author: Marcy
Description: Allows infinite amount of respawns. Penalties for cheating death are not removed.

Name: InfiniteFires
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Set fires to infinite duration with middle mousebutton

Name: InteriorWallDecorations
Author: Atlas Lumi
Description: Let's you decorate your base with pictures, and upload your own.

Name: InterloperRegionSelection
Author: zeobviouslyfakeacc
Description: This mod lets you select the spawn region in Interloper mode.

Name: InventoryReassignments
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This is a mod for The Long Dark that allows players to reassign various gear items to different inventory categories.

Name: ItemPiles
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds blueprints for stacked items.

Name: ItemRarities
Author: Deadman
Description: Item Rarities is a modification that gives each item within The Long Dark a sense of exclusivity.

Name: ItemPicker
Author: Digitalzombie
Description:
Skip item inspection on picking up stick/stones or other items.

Mass pickup of all sticks/stones or other items in a radius around you. With or without calorie cost.

Full customizable.

Name: ItemScanner
Author: hzb1130
Description: TLD MOD that scans nearby items, containers, and harvestable plants around the player and displays their locations on screen.

Name: Jump
Author: Waltz
Description: Allows you to jump. Also has some settings. Installed by dropping it into .../Mods/

Name: KeroseneLampTweaks
Author: Romain
Description: Modify the rates of fuel consumption for kerosene lamps, add decay for them and change the color they emit.

Name: KeyboardUtilities
Author: ds5678
Description:
A utility mod that enables other mods to more easily use keyboard and mouse input.

Patreon

Name: Leatherworks
Author: TonisGaming
Description: Adds a way to renew leather from hide, the ability to make certain leather clothing, and adds tree bark, that can be utilized for many different utilities, like flour, food and string

Name: LitharsRidge
Author: MooseMeat
Description: A hidden ridge in Bleak Inlet with a cozy hut, scenic overlooks, and a path for explorers to discover.

Name: LitharsMending
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Lets you repair ruined clothing items

Name: LocalizationUtilities
Author: STBlade
Description:
** Now Part of ModComponent 7.0.0
Utility mod for localized text.

Name: LonelyOrca
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: A classic mod ported over to post-DLC TLD. A lonely orca is living in Desolation Point.

Name: MaintainYourself
Author: Deus
Description: This adds options to customize condition gain. This can make condition recovery much harder or easier, by making recovery proportional to your needs.

Name: MapMakerTools
Author: ds5678
Description: Mod aiding in mapping the terrain for The Long Dark

Name: MapManager
Author: The Illusion
Description:
Show Player Arrow
Center on player
Reveal Map
Survey Mapping Options:
- Modify Range
- Modify Surveying Time
- Automatic use of Polaroid's (even if you don't have them)
Automatically add corpses to the map

Name: MehToolBox
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: A toolbox for modders to use in their mods.

Name: MinorMiseries
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds 14 new minor afflictions.

Name: MiseryModePlus
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that adds more spawn locations in misery mode and adds a custom setting to enable misery afflictions for custom runs.  Formerly Additional Misery Spawns and Misery in Custom Games.

Name: ModData
Author: STBlade
Description: A utility mod for TLD that lets other mods save data independently of the save file.

Name: ModComponent
Author: STBlade
Description:
Now includes GearSpawner,CraftingRevisions,LocalizationUtilities built in.

Utility Mod; lets you load external item packs.

Name: ModSettings
Author: Digitalzombie
Description:
Lets other mods display their settings in-game. This mod doesn't do anything on its own and should only be used as a dependency for other mods.

Thanks zeobviouslyfakeacc, for all your work!

Name: ModdersGearToolbox
Author: Jods-Its
Description: This mod aims to help other modders by adding 'generic' materials and tools for them to use in their mods. Full list of items in the GitHub repo.

Name: Moment
Author: BA
Description: Modding utility for mods to monitor ingame time and schedule events.

Name: MooseSatchelMod
Author: ttr
Description: Reduce scent and decay for meat, fish and guts and pies, if wearing Moose Bag

Name: MoreCameraSpawns
Author: Fuar
Description: A gameplay mod that adds new spawns for the instant camera around Lower Great Bear

Name: MoreCookingSlots
Author: Marcy
Description: Ever wonder why you can't fit more than 2 pots on a fire barrel? Well, now you can! This mod adds more cooking slots to certain fire sources.

Name: MoreLockedDoors
Author: Fuar
Description: Adds more locks to doors and buildings around the game world.

Name: MoreWood
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: This mod adds two new types of wood. Birch - Similar to Cedar. Spawns in birch forests. Oak - similar to Fir.  Can be found around Oak tress and randomly spawns in forests.

Name: Muscle
Author: BA
Description: Eat well, move a lot and properly sleep, then you will gain muscle.

Name: NonOPTorches
Author: Deus
Description: This mod makes torches less overpowered.

Name: NonLethalFlares
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Disables flaregun damage and bleeding. Option to enable or disable flare gun rounds sticking to wildlife.

Name: NorthernLightsBroadcast
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Watch your favorite movies and series in TLD

Name: NorthfolkClothingPack
Author: Waltz
Description:
Adds 2 previously seen + 3 brand new, inspired by northern folk, craftable clothes.

It's a standard ModComponent pack, installed by dropping it into .../Mods/

Name: NotSoSillyMod
Author: BA
Description: Enable physics for gears placed down for 10 seconds so you can drop your stuff around naturally, or pile up items with the power of gravity. Aims to be practical to use in Survival. Still somewhat risky, check readme for proper usage.

Name: OxygenLevels
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Add a system to simulate oxygen deprivation based on the player's altitude.

Name: PastimeReading
Author: Waltz
Description:
Adds a readable, customizable book with animations and stuff.

Showcasing video. Detailed review(has subtitles).

Mod is installed by extracting .zip into .../Mods/

Name: PathfindersAscent
Author: MooseMeat
Description: An alternate version of Timberwolf Mountain, Blackrock, and Ash Canyon designed to offer a fresh and challenging experience for veteran survivors.

Name: PauseInJournal
Author: Romain
Description: The game will be paused in any category of the Journal

Name: PemmicanSlowerDecay
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Simple mod modifying the cooked Pemmican bar, lowering its decay rate to match cured meat's.

Name: Personality
Author: Waltz
Description:
Lets you customize your character: replace textures and change outfit.

Installed by unpacking it into .../Mods/

Name: PhotoofaLovedOne
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This mod allows you to carry a customizable picture of something you care about.

Name: PickWaterFromFishingHoles
Author: Romain
Description: Collect an unlimited amount of non-potable water from freshwater fishing holes.

Name: PineNeedleTea
Author: Marcy
Description: Harvest pine fascicles and brew them into a tea high in Vitamin C. Everything is customizable.

Name: PlacingAnywhere
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that removes restrictions when placing items, and adds controls to rotate and position the object.

Name: PlantHarvestTweaker
Author: Marcy
Description: Customize everything about plant harvesting: time, required tools, tool degreadation, yield amount.

Name: PredatorSpawnSelector
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Enable or disable predator spawns by region and select which type of wolves or bears for each region. ***This mod replaces both Remove Cougars and Timberwolves Anywhere***

Name: PreserveContainerItems
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Gear items that are at 0% condition will no longer disappear from containers.  CAUTION: Has not been tested on every single type of container, so be careful.

Name: QoL
Author: BA
Description: Reduce UI frustration, even make it pleasant to use. You can now use keyboard most of the time to control your game.

Name: RnStripped
Author: RN mod
Description: Carcass moving and Light torches from electricals - extracted from Relentless Nights mod (check it out!)

Name: RadialMenuUtilities
Author: The Illusion
Description: A utility mod that adds the ability for other mods to create custom radial menus.

Name: RandomMainMenu
Author: Xpazeman
Description: This mod randomizes the time and weather in the main menu screen so it changes everytime you enter it.

Name: RandomizeInterloperRareSpawns
Author: ds5678
Description:
Disables the Interloper loot tables and replaces them with new random spawns. Do not use on existing saves.

Installation Instructions

Patreon

Name: RareExclusiveLoot
Author: Thekillergreece
Description: Items available in Bunkers and/or Trader now appear in the world, albeit rare and in low numbers.

Name: RavineBridgeFix
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Fix the bridge in the Ravine..

Name: RecipeRequirements
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows the player to adjust the cooking skill level required to create specific recipes.

Name: RecordingUtils
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Mod for the Long Dark that adds better camera control for recording or streaming purposes.

Name: ReducedLoot
Author: Fuar
Description: Reduced Loot reduces the amount of certain items in the world by despawning them when they randomly spawn.

Name: RelentlessNight
Author: ShieldHeart
Description:
TLD 2.23 use RN 4.7.2, TLD 2.19 use RN 4.7.1, TLD 2.10+ use RN 4.6.3, TLD 2.06&2.08 use RN 4.6.1
The spin of the earth is slowing. Days and nights are getting longer. Every long night gets colder and harsher than the last. Nowhere is safe from the cold. How long will you survive in this eerie new world?

You can keep up with mod discussion, updates, and report any issues at our Relentless Mods discord channel with this - INVITE.

Name: RelicsOfTheQuietApocalypse
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: Relics of the Quiet Apocalypse mod brings back GearItem textures from the older builds of TLD. (Can be customized via ModSettings.)

Name: RenewableGunpowderMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Adds gunpowder materials: Dusting Sulfur, Stump Remover and Lead to loot pools via beachcombing and container loot tables. I made this mod before I realized AmmunitionCraftingTools mod by Sm4rtBoyTom made better job at making gunpowder renewable. Never mind, someone might use it.

Name: RepairableRepairables
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: Repairable Repairables, gives you the option to fix three of the basic tools used for repairing, crafting and sharpening. The tools that can be fixed are as follows: Rifle Cleaning Kit, Sewing Kit, whetstone/Sharpening Stone

Name: RerollBurntBuildings
Author: Cass
Description: Adds console commands that allow you to reroll the random burnt building spawns. Now also includes the random fishing hut doors. Full instructions in the README.

Name: ResearchBookTweaker
Author: Romain
Description: Formely Shorter Read Intervals Mod

Name: ResumePreviewer
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Displays the SaveSlot that will be loaded before pressing Resume in the Main Menu.

Name: RetrieveBulletsMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description:
This mod makes bullets retrievable from animals you killed with firearms.
You can harvest new items, called "Damaged bullets" from the carcasses and then reforge them at the ammunition workshop.

Name: RetroFoodPack
Author: Thekillergreece
Description: 23 Retro Food items.

Name: RichPresence
Author: Atmudia
Description: Rich Presence for The Long Dark.

Name: RunInBackground
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Keeps the game running, when it looses focus

Name: SafehouseCustomizationPlus
Author: Waltz
Description:
Enables customization everywhere, allows to move and pick up containers, stoves, workbenches and many more.

WARNING! Consider this mod expeimental. There was no reports of losing item, but the possibility is still there. Make save backups just in case

Name: SaveImageFilter
Author: zeobviouslyfakeacc
Description: Saves and reloads your chosen image filter (Options > Display > Image Filter) instead of reverting to 'no filter' every time the game is restarted.

Name: SaveManager
Author: The Illusion
Description: Adds the ability to save, load and autosave in Sandbox/Survival using hotkeys. Also adds the ability to autosave

Name: SaveSafety
Author: BA
Description: This mod keep you notifed on failed saving/loading to avoid save corruption.

Name: ScaledFishMod
Author: BaltaZar
Description: Have you ever wondered why fishes are the same size per type visually? Well, no more! Scaled Fish Mod makes fishes' model size dynamic based on their weight.

Name: SeasonedInterloping
Author: ds5678
Description:
Adds Forsaken Airfield, Bleak Inlet, Zone of Contamination, & Sundered Pass to the list of Interloper start regions.

Patreon

Name: ShelterTemperatureTweaks
Author: Cass
Description: Allows you to tweak the temperature of shelters that have NO LOADING SCREEN, such as the Mountaineer's Hut. Full instructions in the README.

Name: ShootingRange
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Enable shooting range targets, weather vane, hunting blind, and a warm barn near Pensive Pond in Pleasant Valley.

Name: Shortcuts
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds a variety of shortcuts to some regions. You will need to reload the game for the changes to take effect.

Name: SilentProtagonist
Author: Cass
Description: Silences player character voice. Full instructions in the README.

Name: SillyMod
Author: Waltz
Description:
Enables fun: gear items physics, collisions and more

Don't use it on your normal save, you'll regret it

Name: TLDTools
Author: Tactical Ex
Description: Description: A simple tool to make backing up and restoring survival game saves for The Long Dark more convenient. Note: This is an external tool, not a mod and does not require a mod loader to use.

Name: SkillAdjustment
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows the player to adjust the skill benefits for each level.

Name: SkilletInRadial
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: The name says it all.... It adds Skillet to the Radial Panel

Name: SkipIntroRedux
Author: STBlade
Description:
Allows the player to skip to the main menu when starting the game.

Use at your own risk - Now skips those pesky disclaimers.

Name: SkyCoop
Author: Filigrani
Description: Multiplayer mod for the game

Name: SleepWithoutABed
Author: Ezinw
Description: Allows players to sleep without a bed or bedroll. Accessed through the Pass Time option in the radial menu.

Name: Solitaire
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Waste your time in style - play Solitaire

Name: Solstice
Author: Romain
Description: Add seasons into TLD

Name: SonicMode
Author: Waltz
Description: Allows you to go fast. Has additional settings for stamina recovery

Name: Sprainkle
Author: The Illusion
Description: A new and improved mod that entirely replaces the old ankle sprain mod. This mod contains separate settings for ankle and wrist sprains as well as settings for general sprains

Name: StackManager
Author: The Illusion
Description: Adds stacking to more stuff

Name: StalkerAidsAndSupplements
Author: Sm4rtBoyTom
Description: Expansion of the First Aid System. Inspired by S.T.A.L.K.E.R Series. Compatible with Improved Afflictions.

Name: StolenMeatMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Meat outside gets stolen by predators, if not stored properly. If you leave a meat pile on your doorstep, you might attract a few unfriendly visitors too! Force you to stop building meat piles, or maybe use them to your advantage??

Name: StorageProblem
Author: BA
Description: Make container management a minigame.

Name: StoryModeCollectibles
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds collectible items from Wintermute into survival mode.

Name: StretchArmstrong
Author: TLD Modding Community
Description: Change the range at which you can interact with things.

Name: StrongFishingLine
Author: Data-0
Description: A small item that spawns around containers in the world. Usually found in fishing huts. It gives some fishing lines when broken down.

Name: StruggleTweaks
Author: ttr
Description: Set chance to instantly kill wolf after struggle or change bleedout time for wolf. Also you can change tap power to save your mouse buttons

Name: SunOrientationFixes
Author: Cass
Description: Fixes the sun orientation in several regions. Now all regions should be consistent with each other and the world map.

Name: SurvivorKnowledge
Author: Fuar
Description: Simulates survivor knowledge by locking crafting recipes and harvesting actions behind skill levels.

Name: SurvivorsLegacy
Author: BA
Description: Enables a minimal multiplayer interaction: Let other players find your corpse (sort of).

Name: SweatSystem
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds a system to make the player sweat if they get too hot.

Name: TLDWolfskinScarf
Author: MooseMeat
Description: Adds a new craftable scarf made of wolf fur.

Name: TargetPracticeAndMasterHunter
Author: Romain
Description:
Target Practice : Provides a bunch training features allowing you to practice and have fun.
Master Hunter : Offers numerous options to block your automatic, effortless progression through skill levels, ensuring that you earn them more.
See ReadMe for more details.

Name: TheLongDevelopment(TLDev)Regions
Author: Kaiusername
Description: THE LONG DEVELOPMENT is a small team mod project that aims to expand 'THE LONG DARK's' Great Bear Island in both a beautiful and balanced way.

Name: TheLongMood
Author: EtherSystem
Description: Adds Project Zomboid–style Boredom & Depression to The Long Dark.

Name: ThingsToDo
Author: BA
Description: Demo mod for EAAPI, provides some useful actions.

Name: TimeScaleHotkey
Author: Waltz
Description: Allows you to either speed up or slow down time by pressing a configurable hotkey

Name: TinCanImprovements
Author: zeobviouslyfakeacc
Description: Allows you to craft 4 tin cans into 1 scrap metal, reduces the weight of tin cans to 0.05 kg, fixes a canned food item weight bug.

Name: TinyTweaksBuryHumanCorpses
Author: Waltz
Description:
REDUNDANT since Safehouse Customization has same function. But still works

Get rid of those nasty corpses by right-clicking on them

Name: TinyTweaksDroppedObjectOrientation
Author: Waltz
Description: Fix dropped wooden matches and rifle to be in correct orientation. Because yes, they were incorrect

Name: TinyTweaksExtendedFOVSlider
Author: Waltz
Description: Extend FOV slider to 150

Name: TinyTweaksFallDeathGoat
Author: Waltz
Description: Disables fall death triggers but doubles fall damage (can be tweaked)

Name: TinyTweaksMapTextOuline
Author: Waltz
Description: Outline text on the map, so you can actually see what it says. Has a few variants

Name: TinyTweaksPauseOnRadial
Author: Waltz
Description: Slows down time when bringing up radial menus

Name: TinyTweaksRespawnablePlants
Author: Waltz
Description: Plants will now regrow after 45 days (can be changed)

Name: TinyTweaksRunWithLantern
Author: Waltz
Description: Removes restrictions on lantern animation: allows movement and removes camera lock

Name: TinyTweaksWakeUpCall
Author: Waltz
Description: Allows you to interrupt sleep at will. Has an option to wake up when aurora starts, and a few more

Name: ToggleHUD
Author: ds5678
Description:
Allows the player to toggle the scent and time-of-day indicators instead of them disappearing after some time.

Patreon

Name: ToolUpgrade
Author: TonisGaming
Description: Adds alternate ways of acquiring item variants and other items by way of blueprints

Name: ToolsQuality
Author: ttr
Description: Keep Your tools sharp. Low condition of tool increase time to perform actions. Adjust harvesting time multiplier of carcass/branches.

Name: TorchTweaker
Author: Romain
Description: Tweaks a few torch parameters and allow the player to lit torches from lanterns

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkTrackingWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that tracks you across the map, no matter your scent level. Watch your back!

Name: Trespasser
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Adds a new distinct difficulty mode between Stalker and Interloper. Start with 3 matches and a chance to find interloper-banned items around the world.

Name: UniqueKnowledge
Author: BA
Description: Read each book only once.

Name: UnityExplorerTLD
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: UnityExplorer with optimizations for TLD

Name: UniversalTweaks
Author: Deadman
Description: Universal Tweaks is a mod for The Long Dark that enhances existing gameplay elements by modifying them in a way that just make sense.

DisplayName: Use The Worst First And Drop Stone
Name: UseTheWorstFirstAndDropStone
Author: Romain
Description:
Allows you to use the worst condition items first in radial menu and other cases.
Allows you to drop stones/tinders instead of decoy to mark paths. 
See ReadMe for more details.
Aliases: Use The Worst First And Drop Stone

Name: VitaminCTracker
Author: The Illusion
Description: Finally know how much Vitamin C you have! No longer will you live in ignorance

Name: ExpandedAiFrameworkWanderingWolfMod
Author: MonsieurMeh
Description: Creates a new wolf spawn type that wanders around the map instead of staying in a small area.

Name: Watches
Author: Deadman
Description: A modification which alters how time is told within The Long Dark.

Name: WeightlessWoodworkingTools
Author: Data-0
Description: Makes the woodworking tools weight almost nothing. The player shouldn't be punished for wanting to decorate their home

Name: WildFire
Author: MooseMeat
Description: This is a mod for The Long Dark that add color, smoke and sparks customization for fires, along with 6 new gear items and makes several vanilla items burnable.

Name: WildlifeTuning
Author: BA
Description: TLD mod that randomizes animal behavior configurations.

Name: WolvesComeOutAtNight
Author: Cass
Description: Prevents wolves spawning during the day. Can set by region or to apply everywhere. Full instructions in the README.

Name: WoodenStatues
Author: Thekillergreece
Description: Introduces 4 wooden animal statues, small and large.

Name: WorkingClocks
Author: Xpazeman
Description: Mod for The Long Dark that makes some of the clocks in the game work.

Name: YesIKnow
Author: Digitalzombie
Description: Disables the hovertext on items and/or fire
